bets.thesis: Strong, rising analyst revisions in a consumer turnaround give a 1-6mo tailwind that the quant baseline ranks #1; momentum-led book should own the revision leaders.
bets.falsification: Revisions roll over to falling, or the stock underperforms the smallcap250 over the next quarter despite the upgrade cycle.

bets.thesis: Rising revisions plus structural gaming growth; a revision-led tilt with upside if momentum re-disperses in its favor.
bets.falsification: Revisions fade or a regulatory/monetization setback breaks the upgrade trend within a quarter.

bets.thesis: City-gas margin recovery driving strong upward revisions; a lower-beta way to express the revision tilt.
bets.falsification: Gas spreads compress and revisions turn down, or it lags the benchmark over the quarter.

bets.thesis: Rising revisions on a favorable fertilizer/input cycle; revision + mild value overlap.
bets.falsification: Subsidy/input-cost shift turns revisions negative, or it underperforms peers next quarter.

bets.thesis: Improving asset quality/NIM outlook is lifting revisions; revision-led financials add.
bets.falsification: Credit costs rise and revisions reverse, or the SFB cohort de-rates within a quarter.

bets.thesis: Loan-book scale-up driving upgrades; rising-revision NBFC with momentum optionality.
bets.falsification: Asset-quality or growth disappointment turns revisions down within a quarter.

bets.thesis: Renewables capacity build supports a multi-quarter upgrade path; revision-led structural add.
bets.falsification: Order/execution slippage turns revisions negative or the name lags the benchmark next quarter.

bets.thesis: Order-book-driven upgrades in a public-capex cycle; revision tilt with cyclical support.
bets.falsification: Order inflow slows and revisions fade within a quarter.

bets.thesis: Asset-quality normalization lifting revisions in MFI lender; revision-led financials.
bets.falsification: Rural credit stress re-emerges and revisions turn down within a quarter.

bets.thesis: Export demand and pricing supporting upgrades; quality compounder with a live revision tailwind.
bets.falsification: Mining-capex slowdown turns revisions negative within a quarter.

bets.thesis: OTC pharma export scale-up driving upgrades; revision-led healthcare add.
bets.falsification: Regulatory/pricing setback reverses the upgrade trend within a quarter.

bets.thesis: Domestic + export traction lifting revisions; quality pharma with a revision tailwind.
bets.falsification: Revisions stall or USFDA/pricing issues break the trend within a quarter.

bets.thesis: Product-pipeline upgrades supporting rising revisions; revision-led pharma diversifier.
bets.falsification: Key-product erosion turns revisions negative within a quarter.

bets.thesis: Margin and volume recovery lifting revisions; revision-led healthcare cyclical.
bets.falsification: API pricing weakens and revisions reverse within a quarter.

bets.thesis: Growth/NIM normalization lifting revisions; revision-led financials add.
bets.falsification: Loan-growth or asset-quality miss reverses revisions within a quarter.

bets.thesis: Chemicals demand/margin recovery driving upgrades; revision-led materials.
bets.falsification: Chem-cycle weakness turns revisions down within a quarter.

bets.thesis: Rising revisions plus value support keep this a core revision-led financial; baseline also holds it.
bets.falsification: Asset-quality deterioration turns revisions down or it lags the benchmark next quarter.

bets.thesis: Rising revisions in a diversified textile turnaround; conviction hold in the revision cluster.
bets.falsification: Revisions roll over or demand softens within a quarter.

bets.thesis: Retail-lending scale-up lifting revisions; core revision-led financial.
bets.falsification: Credit-cost surprise reverses revisions within a quarter.

bets.thesis: Order-driven upgrades support a continued hold; revision tilt with cyclical backing.
bets.falsification: Order inflow slows and revisions fade within a quarter.

bets.thesis: Gold-loan growth and subsidiary clean-up lifting revisions; revision-led financial hold.
bets.falsification: Regulatory or asset-quality shock reverses revisions within a quarter.

bets.thesis: Bed-expansion and margin gains lifting revisions; revision-led healthcare hold.
bets.falsification: Occupancy/margin miss turns revisions down within a quarter.

bets.thesis: CDMO order momentum supports continued upgrades; revision-led healthcare hold.
bets.falsification: Client/order slippage reverses revisions within a quarter.

bets.thesis: Mining/metals integration still positive but revision momentum is fading; keep a reduced position.
bets.falsification: Revisions re-accelerate (proving the trim wrong) or metals cycle turns up sharply.

bets.thesis: IT-infra services story intact but revision support has softened; trim oversized legacy weight.
bets.falsification: Revisions strengthen again or order wins re-accelerate momentum next quarter.

bets.thesis: Diversified financial with mild value and moderate revisions; keep a smaller core weight.
bets.falsification: Revisions deteriorate further or capital-markets activity slows within a quarter.

bets.thesis: Diversified NBFC with steady but no-longer-strong revisions; reduced hold.
bets.falsification: Revisions fall further or growth disappoints within a quarter.

bets.thesis: Home-textile exporter losing revision support; keep a small position pending evidence.
bets.falsification: Revisions turn back up or US retail restocking lifts orders next quarter.

bets.thesis: Banking-software story intact long term but no live revision/momentum support; reduce.
bets.falsification: Deal wins re-accelerate revisions or momentum within a quarter.

bets.thesis: CDMO/specialty name without revision coverage; hold a reduced weight on its own merit, not on revisions.
bets.falsification: Operating disappointment or a clear momentum breakdown next quarter.

bets.thesis: Generics turnaround with neutral revisions; smaller hold pending a clearer upgrade trend.
bets.falsification: Revisions turn negative or US generics pricing weakens within a quarter.

bets.thesis: High-quality textile vertical; keep a reduced weight despite weak near-term revisions.
